17+ Years of Excellence
Filomeena Sharan
Makeup Artist & Owner
Our Story

Beauty Rooted in Tradition

Sharnam Beauty Parlor was founded by Filomeena Sharan — a passionate makeup artist with over 17 years of expertise in bridal and professional beauty. Her belief is simple: every woman deserves to feel extraordinary.

Filomeena blends traditional Indian beauty wisdom with modern techniques, creating a sanctuary where you can relax, rejuvenate, and rediscover your most beautiful self.

Certified & experienced beauticians
Premium, skin-safe products only
Hygienic, welcoming environment
Personalized care for every client
Bridal packages tailored to your vision
